name: Entrance of Wardome School
description:
Be Well coming you has just entered in Wardome Mud.
You will be here for two levels, us which  will learn
some commands for best to unmask that enourmous world.
So Let's Go!!
              &YTYPE: &RREAD INFORMATION.&n

extra_descriptions.description: If you want to learn how to play mud, only type EAST or E and follow the instructions. Good Luck on WarDome.
